phases.name: Module + toolchain
phases.evidence: Module rewritten in P5 (T-P5-000a) across 198 Go files + go.mod; go 1.26.2 inherited from Crush

phases.name: Strip subsystems
phases.notes: lsp/db/agent/server/oauth/skills retained; bridge bypasses them; revisit V2

phases.name: Polish: rename binary + module rewrite + license notice + slash + status + min-size + logging
phases.evidence: module rewrite, binary rename, NOTICE/CONTRIBUTING/prd.json placed, sibling+--agent-cmd lookup, ~/.gmp/tui.log + --debug stderr, 60x10 banner, /quit /help /clear /debug local traps, R3 fixture skipped, root README license boundary added; go build + vet + go test ./... all green
acceptance_criteria: Binary renamed: omp-tui-go → gmp-tui-go (DONE)
Module path rewritten to github.com/fpcMotif/gosh-my-pi/apps/tui-go (DONE)
go build ./... + go vet ./... clean post-rewrite (DONE; only pre-existing csync vet warning remains)
apps/tui-go/NOTICE placed; root README has license boundary section (DONE)
/quit /help /clear /debug trapped locally; rest forwarded (DONE)
60x10 min-size banner gates rendering (DONE)
~/.gmp/tui.log written; --debug mirrors to stderr (DONE); Ctrl+L overlay deferred (R-overlay)
sibling-then-PATH lookup for omp; --agent-cmd flag override (DONE)
go test ./... clean (DONE; R3 skip-tagged with note)

phases.name: TS-side removal (deprecate TS TUI)
acceptance_criteria: packages/tui/ deleted
packages/coding-agent/src/modes/{interactive-mode.ts,components/,controllers/,theme/} deleted
@oh-my-pi/pi-tui removed from package.json catalog + bun.lock regenerated
bare `omp` errors with --mode {print|rpc|acp} guidance
AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / packages/coding-agent/README.md purged of TS-TUI mentions
bun check:ts clean
bun --cwd=packages/coding-agent test clean

phases.name: CI / release integration
acceptance_criteria: .github/workflows/ci.yml has go_check job (vet+test+staticcheck) on every PR
scripts/ci-release-build-binaries.ts produces gmp-tui-go-{darwin-arm64,darwin-x64,linux-x64,linux-arm64,win32-x64}
scripts/ci-release-build-archives.ts bundles gmp-tui-go alongside omp in gmp-{platform}.tar.gz
apps/tui-go/.goreleaser.yml deleted (we use our own release scripts)

phases.name: Smoke test + release dry-run
acceptance_criteria: Local end-to-end: built gmp-tui-go spawns sibling omp, prompt -> stream -> /quit clean exit
Tagged pre-release on a feature branch produces a usable archive on at least darwin-arm64
Documented installation steps in apps/tui-go/README.md or root README

tasks.title: Place apps/tui-go/prd.json + prd.schema.json
Rewrite Go module path to github.com/fpcMotif/gosh-my-pi/apps/tui-go
tasks.notes: gomvpkg or scripted sed across imports + go.mod module line; regenerate go.sum; verify build/vet/test scoped clean immediately.

tasks.title: Rename binary omp-tui-go → gmp-tui-go
Add apps/tui-go/NOTICE with fork SHA + attribution
Add apps/tui-go/CONTRIBUTING.md (FSL boundary clarification)
Update root README.md with license-boundary section
Audit Crush's slash flow; trap /quit /help /clear /debug locally
Add 60x10 min-size banner gate (verify if Crush has one first)
Verify/adapt logging: ~/.gmp/tui.log, Ctrl+L overlay, --debug stderr
Add sibling-binary lookup before PATH; --agent-cmd flag override
Resolve upstream Crush test fixture failure (provider config)
tasks.notes: expected `openai`, actual `chatgpt-sub`; either fix fixture or document as accepted divergence

tasks.title: Delete packages/tui/ entirely
Delete packages/coding-agent/src/modes/{interactive-mode.ts,components/,controllers/,theme/}
Drop @oh-my-pi/pi-tui from root package.json catalog + bun.lock
Bare `omp` invocation prints --mode guidance error
Purge TS-TUI references from AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / READMEs
bun check:ts + scoped test runs clean
Delete or rewrite apps/tui-go/.goreleaser.yml (we use our scripts)
Add go_check job to .github/workflows/ci.yml
Extend ci-release-build-binaries.ts with Go cross-compile (5 targets, gmp-tui-go-*)
Extend ci-release-build-archives.ts to bundle gmp-tui-go alongside omp
Install Go 1.26 in release_binary CI matrix
Local end-to-end smoke test (sibling omp, prompt, /quit)
Tagged pre-release dry run on darwin-arm64
Document install steps in root README + apps/tui-go/README.md

risks.title: Module path rewrite (T-P5-000a) creates large diff; future subtree-pulls conflict on import lines
risks.mitigation: Land T-P5-000a as a single dedicated commit. Document pre/post mapping in NOTICE. Expect ~30 import-line conflicts per upstream Crush merge.

risks.title: Crush's lsp/db/agent/server kept; bloat + attack surface; some have CGO deps
risks.mitigation: Defer aggressive prune to V2. If any inherited subsystem breaks build on a target platform, prune the offender.

risks.title: Upstream Crush fixture failure (provider 'openai' vs 'chatgpt-sub')
risks.mitigation: Fix fixture in our fork or skip-tag the test; document so future merges don't keep flagging it.

risks.title: Aggressive immediate TS-TUI deletion (Q18) blocks fallback if gmp-tui-go regresses
risks.mitigation: P8 smoke test must pass on darwin-arm64 + linux-x64 before P6 commits land on main.

risks.title: Crush slash-command flow may shadow planned local traps (/quit /help /clear /debug)
risks.mitigation: T-P5-004 audit; if Crush already has /quit, route through it; document delta.

risks.title: Three workspace impls (omp/app/client) coexist; future devs may pick the wrong one
risks.mitigation: Comment-only doc on omp_workspace.go declaring it as the only supported impl.

risks.title: Subtree merges from upstream Crush will conflict on root.go (modified) + workspace/ (new file)
risks.mitigation: Document conflict-resolution playbook; expect ~30 min per upstream pull.

risks.title: Crush goreleaser config still says project_name: crush; would publish under wrong name if invoked

verification_run.go_test_full: pass (R3 fixture skipped in store_test.go with skip-tag note)
verification_run.rpc_handshake: pass (P3-time evidence; not re-run in P5)
